---
title: "Page Not Found"
format: html
---

<div id="content"></div>

<script>
const path = window.location.pathname;
const content = document.getElementById('content');

if (path.startsWith('/toolbox')) {
  content.innerHTML=`
    <h2>Looking for the Toolbox?</h2>
    <p>
      The Toolbox section has been retired, so links to it no longer work.
      The resources that used to live there have been moved to our
      <a href="/training/">Training</a> section.
    </p>
    <p>
      In Training, you will find our self-learning catalog, tutorials, and other open science
      resources. Please update any bookmarks or saved links to point there instead.
    </p>
  `;
} else if (/^\/news(?:\/|$)/.test(path)) {
  content.innerHTML=`
    <h2>Looking for an old News link?</h2>
    <p>
      Some older <a href="/news/">News</a> links no longer work because the news pages were
      renamed when the site structure changed.
    </p>
    <p>
      Please visit the current <a href="/news/">News</a> page to browse recent posts, or use
      the site search function to find the page you were expecting.
    </p>
  `;
} else if (/^\/members(?:\/|$)/.test(path)) {
  content.innerHTML=`
    <h2>Our Members Pages Have Moved!</h2>
    <p>
      The individual member pages now live in our <a href="/people/members">People</a> section.
      Please update any bookmarks or links that still point to the old address.
    </p>
  `;
} else if (/^\/partners(?:\/|$)/.test(path)) {
  content.innerHTML=`
    <h2>Partner information has moved</h2>
    <p>
      Links to our funders, institutional members, external partners, and local Open Science
      initiatives now live in the <a href="/partners/">Partners</a> section.
    </p>
    <p>
      If you were looking for a specific partner page, start from the Partners overview and
      follow the category that best matches what you need.
    </p>
  `;
} else if (/^\/meetups(?:\/|$)/.test(path)) {
  content.innerHTML=`
    <h2>Meetups are no longer listed here</h2>
    <p>
      The old meetups section is no longer available at this address.
      Most related content can now be found in the <a href="/partners/">Partners</a> section for
      local Open Science initiatives, in the <a href="/events/">Events</a> section for
      upcoming and past events, or via the search function for any remaining content.
    </p>
    <p>
      If you're not able to find the specific meetup information you were looking for, please contact us so we can help you find it and update any links that may be out of date.
    </p>
  `;
} else if (/^\/contact(?:\/|$)/.test(path)) {
  content.innerHTML=`
    <h2>Looking for the contact page?</h2>
    <p>
      The old contact page has been replaced by our <a href="/about/join-us.html">Join Us</a>
      page, which explains how to get involved and reach the right team.
    </p>
  `;
} else {
  content.innerHTML=`
    <h2>Oops -- we can't find that page!</h2>
    <p>
      The address you opened may be incorrect, the page may have moved, or the link may be out
      of date. Try one of the links below to get back to the main site:
    </p>
    <ul>
      <li><a href="/">Home</a></li>
      <li><a href="/about/">About the LMU Open Science Center</a></li>
      <li><a href="/training/">Training resources</a></li>
      <li><a href="/events/">Events</a></li>
      <li><a href="/news/">News</a></li>
    </ul>
    <p>
      If you reached this page from a link on our site, please
      <a href="https://github.com/lmu-osc/lmu-osc.github.io/issues">let us know on GitHub</a> or send an email to a staff or management team member so we can
      fix it.
    </p>
  `;
}
</script>
